rationale.R1.1: The artifact culminates in a contribution claim ('deployment-validated automated turn-cue system'); any substantive review must assess whether that claim is coherent and justified by the preceding argument.
rationale.R1.2: The paragraph chains prior findings → field study → HMM/regression → results → contribution. Logical consistency—whether each step actually licenses the next—is central to a meaningful look at this passage.
